hero.title: Create AI content
hero.description: Generate images, videos and avatars with AI using your own keys. Zero markup. Composable pipeline for agents and teams.

byok.title: BYOK — Bring your own keys
byok.desc: fal.ai, ElevenLabs, Hedra, Gemini, OpenAI, Creatomate. You pay directly.

pipeline.title: Composable pipeline
pipeline.desc: Chain image → video → narration → final composition in a single job.

vault.title: AES-256 Vault
vault.desc: Keys encrypted with AES-256-GCM. The master key never touches the database.

scale.title: Multi-agent & teams
scale.desc: Multiple users, asset sharing and centralized history.

pricing.title: Simple and transparent
pricing.subtitle: Pay only for what you use. No surprise monthly fees.

cta.title: Ready to create?
cta.desc: Start for free, bring your keys and scale when you need.

footer.tagline: AI Media Studio — BYOK · Composable Pipeline · AES-256 Vault

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Select an option from the menu to get started.

jobs.title: Jobs
jobs.subtitle: Your content generation jobs.
jobs.emptyDesc: Create your first image or video generation job.

keys.title: API Keys — BYOK
keys.subtitle: Bring your own API keys. You pay directly to the APIs — zero markup. Encrypted with AES-256-GCM before saving.
keys.label: Label
keys.keyOriginalNote: Original value never stored — only the GCM blob.

vault.title: AES-256-GCM Vault
vault.desc: Keys encrypted with a separate master key (VAULT_KEY env var). The original text never touches the database. Only the SHA-256 hash is stored for verification. Cannot be reversed.

errors.duplicate: A key with this provider and label already exists

apiKeys.title: API Keys — BYOK
apiKeys.subtitle: Bring your own keys. You pay directly to the APIs — zero platform markup. All encrypted with AES-256-GCM before persisting.

vault.title: AES-256-GCM Vault active
vault.desc: Each key gets a unique IV. The master key (VAULT_KEY) lives only in env vars — never in the database. Only the SHA-256 hash + preview are stored. Reversal is impossible without the master key.
